title: Pan-Seared Herring with Savory Rice
description: A simple and flavorful dish from Norway, featuring pan-seared herring served with a side of savory rice.
instructions: Heat a non-stick skillet over medium-high heat.
Add 1 tablespoon of butter and let it melt.
Add the herring fillets and sear for 2-3 minutes on each side.
Remove the herring from the skillet and set it aside.
In the same skillet, add the remaining 1 tablespoon of butter.
Add the cooked savory rice to the skillet and stir to combine with the butter.
Season the rice with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve the pan-seared herring on top of the savory rice.
